query:
SELECT 
  audioTranscriptionStatus AS status,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM messages
WHERE messageType IN ('audioMessage', 'pttMessage')
GROUP BY audioTranscriptionStatus
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
